overall.description: A first-person gameplay walkthrough of a rainy night in Cyberpunk 2077's Night City. The player walks from a sidewalk up an elevated highway overpass, descends to street level, and continues through a neon-lit commercial district with futuristic storefronts, palm trees, and scattered pedestrians. The scene features heavy rain, cyberpunk architecture with glowing advertisements, and a moody green-teal color palette.
